details: Sleeping Mask: Epic face artifact with +2.5 Health Regen.
Sweater: Legendary back artifact with +10.0% TS Range and +10.0% TS Control.
Scorched Cloak: Mythic back artifact with +5.0% Burn DMG on all attacks, all Burn DMG multiplied by 1.1x, and +5.0 Health Regen.
Colossal Scars: Mythic face artifact with +15.0% Colossal Titan Stats, +1 Shifts, -20.0% Awakening Bar Drain for Colossal Titan, and Atomic Ascension range increased by 150m.
items.player_tip: Colossal Scars is the most directly Colossal-focused artifact listed because it boosts Colossal Titan stats and shifting uptime.

items.title: Track Colossal cosmetics and materials
items.description: The Colossal Titan Raid also adds cosmetics, a shard, and the Colossal Serum to the reward pool.
details: Cosmetics include Mushroom Cloud, Superheated, Aspiring Warrior Attire, and Atomic Bomb.
Colossal Shard is listed as a Legendary shard reward.
Colossal Serum is listed as a Mythic Serum reward.
items.player_tip: Cosmetic and shard value can change with market demand, so check current trading values before selling or swapping rare drops.

items.title: Use Update 4 Colossal Titan knowledge
items.description: Update 4 also introduced Colossal Titan shifting skills and resonance, which helps players understand why Colossal-related drops are high-interest rewards.
details: Colossal Titan skills include Footstep, Swipe, Eject, Shifter Mastery, Destruction Mastery, Atomic Ascension, Anguish, Seismic Shock, Tectonic Quake, Incendiary Volley, and Heatwave.
Colossal Titan resonance includes Evolving Havoc, Unmatched Devastation, Explosive Liberation, Infinite Chaos, Thermal Absolution, and Hakai No Kami.
items.player_tip: Players farming the raid for Colossal Serum should also track Colossal Scars and Colossal Shard because they support long-term Colossal Titan progression.

faq.title: Attack on Titan Revolution
faq.subtitle: Answers for Attack on Titan Revolution codes, progression, Families, Perks, Skill Trees, Prestige, Raids, Titan shifting, Artifacts, Missions, controls, and official Roblox links.

questions.question: What is Attack on Titan Revolution on Roblox?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution is a Roblox anime titan battle RPG built around ODM combat, Missions, Families, Perks, Raids, Titan shifting, and progression rewards.

questions.question: How do Attack on Titan Revolution codes work?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution codes grant rewards such as Spins, Emperor Keys, Luck Potions, Gold Potions, XP Potions, Gems, Shards, and event currency when redeemed from the Codes menu.

questions.question: Which Attack on Titan Revolution Family should I keep?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution Families such as Fritz, Helos, Ackerman, Yeager, Reiss, Leonhart, and Tybur are strong keeps because they support high-value ODM, shifter, raid, or utility builds.

questions.question: Which Attack on Titan Revolution perks should I target?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution perk targets depend on your build: Kengo and Black Flash support ODM damage, Art of War and Founder's Blessing support Shifter play, and Font of Inspiration supports raid teams.

questions.question: How should I spend Attack on Titan Revolution skill points?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution skill points should follow your build goal: Offense for faster clears, Defense for safer progression, Support for raid utility, Family skills for specialty routes, and Shifter skills for Titan form uptime.

questions.question: When should I prestige in Attack on Titan Revolution?
questions.answer: Prestige in Attack on Titan Revolution after reaching the required level and full EXP bar, then choose a permanent boost and Prestige Memory that match your long-term farming or raid plan.

questions.question: When should I start Attack on Titan Revolution Raids?
questions.answer: Start Attack on Titan Revolution Raids after your Missions, ODM control, gear upgrades, Family choice, Perks, and skill-tree path can support phase-based boss fights.

questions.question: How do I unlock Attack on Titan Revolution Titan shifting?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution Titan shifting starts with a Serum. Farm raids, Aberrant missions, or eligible trades, equip the Serum, then build Shifter mastery through repeated transformed combat.

questions.question: Which Attack on Titan Revolution Artifacts and Memories matter most?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution Artifacts and Memories matter when they match your build goal: Luck for farming, ODM speed and damage for mission clears, Shifter stats for Titan forms, and support Memories for raid teams.

questions.question: Which Attack on Titan Revolution Missions should I farm?
questions.answer: Attack on Titan Revolution Missions such as Giant Forest, Shiganshina, Trost, Loading Docks, Utgard, and Outskirts support gold, EXP, perks, Serum chances, and Prestige Scroll farming on higher difficulties.

questions.question: What Attack on Titan Revolution controls should new players learn first?
questions.answer: New Attack on Titan Revolution players should learn ODM hooks, boost timing, reload rhythm, slash timing, camera aim, and platform-specific movement controls before pushing Aberrant missions or raids.

questions.question: Where are the official Attack on Titan Revolution Trello and Discord links?
questions.answer: The official Attack on Titan Revolution links section includes the Roblox game page, Trello board, Discord server, Wiki, Roblox community, and EvolutionPower social channel.
